headline: Morgan Stanley Adjusts P&C Targets, Cuts Brown & Brown (BRO) to $70
summary: Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO) is included among the 15 Best Consistent Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 6, Morgan Stanley lowered its price recommendation on Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO) to $70 from $76. It maintained an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The firm adjusted targets across the property and casualty […]

headline: Strategic Acquisitions Power Long-Term Growth for Willis Towers Watson
summary: WTW ramps up growth via acquisitions, boosting AI and global reach as strategic deals enhance capabilities and expand into high-margin markets.
